title: Argentinian Beef Wrap
description: A flavorful and savory beef wrap inspired by the cuisine of Argentina. Grilled beef, onions, and bell peppers are wrapped in a rustic tortilla.
instructions: Season flank steak with salt and black pepper.
Grill flank steak for 5-6 minutes per side, or until desired level of doneness.
Let flank steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Grill sliced onions and bell peppers for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Warm rustic tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble wrap by layering sliced beef, grilled onions and bell peppers, and minced garlic.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
